items.title: Robert Lewandowski makes shock Chicago Fire transfer as Barcelona target England World Cup ace Harry Kane as replacement
items.summary: ROBERT LEWANDOWSKI has completed a move to MLS side Chicago Fire. The 37-year-old has penned a two-year deal with the club after leaving Barcelona as a free agent. items.title: Kane will sign new Bayern deal - Tuesday's gossip
items.summary: Harry Kane will extend his Bayern Munich contract, Manchester City plan major rebuild, while Rayo Vallecano left-back Pep Chavarria is a target for Chelsea.

items.title: Roy Keane swallows pride and changes his mind on Brazil World Cup star Casemiro after brutal half-time analysis on ITV
items.summary: ROY KEANE was forced to perform a major U-turn on Casemiro during Brazil's clash with Japan. The Brazilian midfielder was the subject of ridicule by many associated with Manchester United during his Old Trafford stay. items.title: England stars workout with tiny dumbbells to boost power on the pitch in World Cup clash against Congo
items.summary: ENGLAND stars worked out with tiny dumbbell weights as they geared up for a heavyweight World Cup clash with the Congo tomorrow.  Harry Kane, Bukayo Saka and Nico O’Reilly were among the stars pumping as little as half a kilogram to boost power on the pitch.  The Three Lions tack

items.title: Casemiro’s daughter in tears after Man Utd star goes from zero to hero to lead Brazil’s World Cup fightback vs Japan
items.summary: CASEMIRO left his proud wife and daughter in tears after going from zero to hero for Brazil. The Manchester United man faced calls to be subbed off at half-time as Carlo Ancelotti's men trailed Japan 1-0 thanks to Kaishu Sano's opener. items.title: 45 minutes from Brazil 'humiliation' - but 'Crafty Carlo' does it again
items.summary: Half-time in Houston and Brazil's players trudged off facing another early World Cup exit. But we should have known better than to doubt Carlo Ancelotti.

items.title: Luke Littler issues tactical warning to Thomas Tuchel after major weakness he spotted at England vs Panama clash
items.summary: LUKE LITTLER has revealed his only concern about the England squad as Thomas Tuchel and Co prepare for the World Cup knockouts.
